summary: Settings screen, white-label, Crashlytics implementation reviewed. 3 findings: 1 minor (hardcoded app name), 1 low (unused SnackbarHostState), 1 info (sanitizer regex documentation).

findings.finding: About section uses hardcoded 'MCW Wallet' and '1.0.0' instead of BuildConfig.APP_NAME and BuildConfig.VERSION_NAME. This breaks white-label requirement.
SnackbarHostState is created but never used. Dead code.

MNEMONIC_PATTERN matches 5+ consecutive lowercase words. This could false-positive on normal English sentences. Acceptable for MVP — sanitizer is defense-in-depth, primary protection is TxLogEvent data class which structurally excludes sensitive fields.
